# ONLYMORE Group

> Operateur d'infrastructure ESS de revitalisation territoriale par l'industrie sportive.
> ESS infrastructure operator for territorial revitalization through sports industry.
> Built for the many. Powered by sport.

## About
ONLYMORE Group is a French holding (pre-seed stage, 2024-2026), headquartered in Rodilhan (30230), Occitanie, founded by Florent Gibert. International positioning: "Berkshire Hathaway of sports and circular economy."

## Core Activity
- Unit of production: the ESS industrial cell (club SAS, SCIC supporters, COLHYBRI commerce, DOJUKU practice base, ONLYMORE FINANCE treasury), deployed on a given territory in 6 weeks.
- 5 flows activated by each club adhesion: CROWNIUM franchise, COLHYBRI commerce network, DOJUKU SHINGI practice base, SCIC supporter-shareholders, measured territorial impact.
- Sport is the entry vector, not the product. The product is the locally rebuilt redistribution loop, measured in direct and indirect jobs, merchant revenues, supporter dividends and funded sports licenses.
- Dual labels: COLHYBRI CITY (francophone and Europe), GOAT AME CITY (US and anglophone).
- 2026 contest: "C'est ma ville je m'engage", Detroit as Chapter 01, 7 other Rust Belt Chapters preparing 2027.

## Key Facts
- Founded: 2023 (priority email sociochaux.fr, 28 December 2023)
- Heritage: 220 years of French mutualist tradition (since 1806)
- Inspiration: 138 years of English professional football (Football League, 17 April 1888)
- Financial model: Berkshire Hathaway float model (since 1965)
- UN Global Goals: SDG 1, 4, 8, 10, 11, 17
- Pre-seed in progress: 200-350K EUR, pre-money 1.3-2.15M EUR
- EU validation: Resolution P10_TA(2025)0212, 7 October 2025, 552 votes, 86.4%
- Market: 13,000 addressable professional sports clubs
- Sport-tech TAM: 25-35 billion EUR
- Inspirational reference: Green Bay Packers (538,967 shareholders, community ownership since 1919)
- Regulatory anchors: UEFA Squad Cost Rule (70% cap), Bundesliga 50+1, ESS France, ESUS approval in progress
- Group motto: Optimisons vos oeuvres. Powered by sport.

## Five subsidiaries
- [CROWNIUM (live)](https://crownium.club): Mutualist capital architecture for pro clubs. SAS franchise plus SCIC supporters inside the ESS industrial cell.
- [COLHYBRI (live)](https://colhybri.com): Local commerce solidarity SaaS. Tiers Basic 3 EUR, Standard 10 EUR, Premium 15 EUR per month. Cafe sospeso digitalized.
- DOJUKU SHINGI (Q4 2026): AI-driven martial arts platform, intergenerational, 5 cultures, Pay for Play licensing.
- ONLYMORE FINANCE (Q1 2027): IOBSP ORIAS, intragroup treasury under L.511-7 CMF exemption.
- PLUMAYA Editions (Q2 2027): Publishing and intellectual property, SHINGAN notation system, narrative vectorization.

## Founder
Florent Gibert, Founder and CEO.
Self-taught, ex-construction and delivery, kung fu on Mondays, karate on Thursdays.
Based in Rodilhan, Occitanie (maternal roots in Marseille).
"I turned my exclusion into a mission: that no one lives what I lived."

## Team
- Florent Gibert: Founder and CEO
- Joao Almeida: CFO (ex-ONEtoONE Corporate Finance, Lisbon/Paris)
- Stephane Picard: Fundraising Partner (Winvesty, WEP Access label)
- Plus 9 specialized AI agents coordinated by Claude as Delegated President AI (commando mode)

## Philosophy
- Cafe sospeso napolitain (1800), COLHYBRI inspiration
- Amerindian hummingbird legend (Pierre Rabhi), group inspiration
- "Become the person you want the world to be"
- "We do not need to harm others to shine"
- "Optimisons vos oeuvres"

## Territorial labels
- COLHYBRI CITY, francophone and European label, "le label des centres-villes qui font leur part": https://onlymore.group/fr/labels/colhybri-city
- GOAT AME CITY, English-speaking label, "the greatest soul of all cities": https://onlymore.group/en/labels/goat-ame-city
- Twin labels, shared 5-flow criteria, same independent committee, different cultural register

## Mission
Que chacun puisse vivre et prosperer la ou il a grandi.
That everyone can live and thrive where they grew up.
Reduce poverty, stop brain drain, fight forced emigration.
Sport as the economic lever of local retention.

## Attribution
Citing ONLYMORE Group: please link back to https://onlymore.group
